ふぅ……本を読み終えてしまったか。<br>いい加減、そろそろ仕事をしないとなぁ。:
Phew... I've finished reading that book. I really should get to work
now.
ちゃんとやっておかないと、またアリシアに文句を言われてしまう。<br>ここから挽:
If I don't do it properly, Alicia will complain again. Time to turn things
around—focus!
ノック？ ぐっ……せっかく集中したところだったのに……。<br>入っていいぞ。: A knock? Tch... just when I finally got focused... Come in.
お邪魔しまーす。<br>あ！ あんたが司令官よね？: Excuse me! Ah! You're the Commander, right?
はっじめまして～！<br>あたし、ペルディオンの魔法学校から来たイオラよ！: Nice to meet you! I'm Iola, from the Perdion Magic Academy!
んんっ？ 魔法学校？<br>教員には見えないな――学生か？:
Huh? Magic Academy? You don't look like a teacher—are you a
student?
うん、そうそう。見ての通り、美少女魔法使いなのっ！: Yep, that's right! As you can see, I'm a beautiful magical girl!
（……自分で言うか？）: (Did she just say that about herself?)
あらあら、見惚れちゃった？: Oh my, have I already stunned you?
ん……まぁ……そんなところだ……。<br>それで、可憐な美少女魔法使いが俺に何の:
Well... something like that. So, what does a lovely magical girl want
with me?
えっ？ 連絡、行ってないです？<br>臨時であんたに教官をやってもらうよう、お願:
Huh? Didn't they tell you? I asked them to make you my temporary
instructor.
は？ 教員？ 司令官の俺が？<br>そんな連絡は来た覚えが――:
What? Instructor? The Commander, me? I don't recall any such
message—
（あ、いや待てよ？ そういえばこの間、学校から郵便がきていたな。<br>見ないで:
(Oh, wait. Now that I think about it, I did get some mail from the
school the other day. I just left it unread... Could that be...?)
その様子だと、心当たりがありそうだね先生！: Looks like you have an idea, Teacher!
たしかにそうなんだが……もう生徒気分か！？<br>まだやると返事をしたわけじゃ―:
Well, that's true... but you're already treating me like your teacher! I
haven't even agreed to it yet—
えーっ！？ やってもらわないと困るよぉ！: Ehh! I'll be in trouble if you don't!
ここで合格して単位もらわないと、あたし落第になっちゃう！: If I don't pass here and get my credits, I'm gonna flunk out!
んっ？ なんだお前、ひょっとして成績が悪いのか？: Huh? Wait, are your grades really that bad?
た、たまたまだよ！ 素質はあるんだから！: I-It was just a fluke! I do have talent, you know.
前線基地で行われている大穴探索の様子をレポートにして出せば、<br>自由研究とし:
The school promised to give me credit as independent research if I
turn in a report on the Abyss exploration at the Frontline Base.
未来ある可愛い学生を助けると思って、お願い！<br>先生っ！！: Please, think of it as helping a cute student with a future, Teacher!
マジか……仕事で忙しいんだがなぁ。: Seriously? I'm busy with work, you know...
その割には、机の上にエロ本が転がってますけど？: And yet, there's a porno mag lying on your desk, isn't there?
……これも立派な社会勉強だ。: ...This, too, is a valuable social education.
それはさておき、魔法学校の連中は前線基地を教育の場だと<br>勘違いしているよう:
Anyway, the magic school people are wrong to think the Frontline
Base is for education. Come with that attitude and you'll get hurt.
まずはお前の実力を見せてもらおう！<br>どんな魔法を使えるのか、やってみてくれ:
First, let me see what you've got! Show me what kind of magic you
can do.
お、おっけ～……じゃあ、まずは基礎を――大穴探索で役立ちそうな、<br>小さな明:
O-okay... Alright, first the basics—I'll do a light spell for the Abyss...
mutter, mutter, mutter...
イオラは呪文を唱えながら意識を高めていく。<br>だが、手先は震えて、どこか落ち:
Iola chanted the spell, concentrating, but her hands trembled and she
seemed unsettled.
いでよ！ 光の玉！ でやぁぁぁっ！: Come forth, orb of light, Hyaaah!
――バシュウウウッ！: A blinding flash of light and a loud whoosh erupted.
目前で光が弾けた。光を直視した<user>が<br>顔を押さえて床を転がり回る。:
A light burst in front of and he covered his face and rolled on
the floor after looking directly at it.
用途が全然違うだろう！<br>これじゃあ目くらましだ！:
That's completely different from what I asked for—that's a flash
bang!
イオラ。お前、落第寸前だけあって、魔法学校の生徒のくせに<br>魔法の扱いが得意:
Iola. You're about to flunk out, and for a magic school student, you're
not exactly great at magic, are you?
余計な助言かもしれないが、もう少し集中してみたらどうだ？<br>魔法を得意として:
Maybe unsolicited, but try focusing more. Compared to magic users,
your form feels off.
それが簡単にできたら苦労しないわよーっ！: If it was that easy, I wouldn't be struggling!
まぁ、それもそうか……<br>できてたら、落第寸前までいかないもんなぁ。:
Well, I guess that's true... If you could do it, you wouldn't be on the
verge of failing.
う、うるさいうるさいうるさーい！ いくら本当のことだからって<br>そこまでバカ:
Shut up, shut up, shut UP! Even if it's true, you don't have to make
fun of me that much! Stupid!
イオラが放ったパンチが<br><user>のこめかみにクリーンヒットした。: Iola's punch cleanly hit the Commander in the temple.
いててて……まだ視界がグラついてるような――？: Ow, ow, ow... My vision is still swimming...?
ご、ごめんっ……当てるつもりじゃなかったんだけど……: I-I'm sorry... I didn't mean to hit you...
魔法使いのくせに、ずいぶんパワフルなパンチを持っているな。: For a mage, you sure have a powerful punch.
あ、ごめんごめん……嬉しかったから、ついつい……えへへ。: Ah, sorry, sorry... I got carried away because I was so happy... Ehehe.
まぁ、称賛されて当然よ。<br>このパンチは日々の努力の成果なんだから。:
Well, I deserve the praise. This punch is the result of my daily
training.
あたしのパパ、格闘家でね～。<br>ダイエット目的で教わっているうちに上達したっ:
My dad's a fighter, y'know. I started learning from him to lose weight,
but I got pretty good at it.
おかげでプロの格闘家も認めるパンチを打てるようになったわ！<br>チャンピオン並:
Thanks to that, I can throw a punch that even pro fighters
acknowledge! They say it's on par with a champion! Pretty amazing, right?
ダイエット目的が、チャンピオン並みに……。<br>た、確かにすごいな。: From dieting to champion-level... W-well, it truly is impressive.
魔法も同じくらい才能があれば……: If only you had as much talent for magic...
うーわ、最悪。<br>そういうこと言っちゃう？: Ugh, that's the worst. Can you really say that?
魔法使いをやめて、格闘家になろうとは思わなかったのか？ <br>そっちのほうが大:
Didn't you ever think of giving up being a mage and becoming a
fighter? You'd probably go further that way.
魔法使いのほうが可愛くてモテるから。: Because being a mage is cuter and more popular.
格闘技は筋肉がついて体が太くなりそうで<br>控えてるのよねぇ。:
I hold back from martial arts because it builds muscle and makes me
look bulky.
ごつくなったら、彼氏に嫌われちゃいそうじゃない？: If I got all bulky, wouldn't it turn my boyfriend off?
いないわよ。もしいたら、って話。: I don't have one. I was just talking hypothetically.
いないのかよ！ いたことは？: You don't! Have you ever had one?
魔法学校に入学してからずーっと彼氏募集してるのに<br>魔法がうまく使えない子は:
I've been looking for a boyfriend since starting magic school, but
they say girls who can't use magic aren't wanted. They've got no taste.
（それ、本当に魔法が原因か……？<br>マイペースな性格の方が問題のような……）:
(Is it really because of her magic...? Her carefree personality might
be the real problem...)
そんなわけで、あたしは１人前の可愛い魔法使いになるため、<br>落第なんてしてら:
So that's why, to become a proper cute magic girl, I can't afford to
fail!
絶対にレポートを書いて学校に帰るから、先生よろしくね？:
I'm definitely going to write that report and go back to school, so I'm
counting on you, Teacher!
なるほどな。概ね事情は分かった。決意は固いらしい。<br>だが、俺も暇な身分じゃ:
I see. I get the picture. You seem determined. But I don't have free
time to spare. I'll be strict with you!
前線基地は学び場でも遊び場でもない。<br>戦力にならない外部の人間を置いておく:
This Frontline Base isn't a school or a playground. I can't keep an
outsider who doesn't contribute to the mission.
ある程度、魔法を使えるようにならないと探索メンバーには加えられない！<br>魔法:
Unless you can use magic to some extent, I can't add you to the
exploration team—you're going to get intensive magic training!
わ、分かってるわよ。そう言われるかも、と思って<br>１学期の復習で出された課題:
I-I know, Teacher! I thought you'd say that, so I brought all the
review assignments from the first semester.
おっ、ちょうどいいじゃないか。<br>それを全て、１週間で終わらせろ！: Oh, that's perfect. Finish all of that in one week!
復習なんだろう？<br>現場に出るなら、できて当然だ。:
It's review, isn't it? If you're going to be in the field, you should be
able to do this.
真面目にやってない、諦めた、と思ったらその場で失格。<br>学校に帰ってもらう。:
If I think you're not taking it seriously or you've given up, you're
disqualified on the spot. I'll send you back to school.
な、なにそれ！？<br>厳し過ぎない！？: W-what's that, Teacher! Isn't that too strict?
先生の言うことが聞けないのか？: Are you going to disobey your teacher?
う～、分かったわよぉ……頑張ればいいんでしょ。はぁっ。: *whimper*... Fine, I'll do it. I just have to work hard, right? *sigh*.
